guest.name: Guest
guest.heading: You're browsing as a guest
guest.body: Sign in to track orders, place bids, and access your dashboard.

hub.restartNotice: The app will restart to apply the new text direction.

rolesAccess.title: Roles & Access
rolesAccess.subtitle: Run multiple dashboards from one account. Request a role and an admin will review it.
rolesAccess.approvalNote: Requires admin approval. Admin access is never self-granted.
rolesAccess.allHeld: You already hold every available role. 🎉

signIn.title: Welcome back
signIn.subtitle: Sign in to your AgroTraders account

forgotPassword.title: Reset your password
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter your email and we'll send a reset link.
forgotPassword.sent: If that email is registered, a reset link is on its way. Open it to set a new password.

otpLogin.title: Sign in with a code
otpLogin.subtitle: We'll email you a 6-digit code — no password needed.
otpLogin.codeSent: If that email is registered, a code is on its way.

signUp.title: Create your account
signUp.checkInboxBody: We sent a confirmation link to {{email}}. Open it to activate your account, then sign in here.
signUp.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.
signUp.error: Could not create the account. Try a different email.
signUp.subtitle: Pick your role — you can add more later.
signUp.terms: By continuing you agree to the Terms and Privacy policy.

chat.feedPlaceholder: Share an update, ask a question, or post what you need…
chat.feedHint: Anyone can see and reply to feed posts. Tap a name to chat privately.
chat.signInToPost: Sign in to post, reply or message
chat.chooseTopic: What do you need help with?
chat.subject: Subject
chat.welcome: Hi! Pick a topic and our team will help you.
chat.empty: No messages yet — start the conversation.
chat.title: Title
chat.noGroups: You have not joined any groups yet.
chat.noTickets: You have no support tickets yet.

dash.noShipments: No shipments in transit right now.
dash.sellerSub: Here's how your store is performing.
dash.noDrivers: Add drivers from the Drivers section to track reliability here.
dash.loaderSub: Your crews and jobs at a glance.
dash.offline: You're offline — hirers won't see you as available.

pricing.title: Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Your crew rates per metric tonne. Saved to your account.
pricing.emptyBody: Add your first service rate above.

reviews.title: Reviews
reviews.emptyBody: Clients rate you once a job you did is completed.

availability.title: Availability
availability.subtitle: Tap a cell to toggle which crew shifts are open each day.

teams.title: Teams
teams.emptyBody: Create a team and add crew to it.
teams.allOnTeam: All workers are on this team.

workers.title: Workers
workers.createLogin: Create a login so they can use the app

jobs.title: Jobs
jobs.emptyRequestsBody: New jobs will appear here to claim.
jobs.emptyActiveBody: Claim an open request to staff it.
jobs.allAssigned: All your workers are already on this job.

market.label: Market
market.pendingHint: Visible only to you until an admin approves it.
market.reviewHint: New markets are reviewed by an admin. You can use it on your listings straight away.
market.name: Market name

gallery.hint: Tap a photo to make it the cover. The first photo is what buyers see.
gallery.permissionError: Photo permission is needed to add images.
gallery.uploadError: Image upload failed. Try smaller photos.

add.subtitle: List a product for buyers to discover and order.
add.name: Product name
add.supplyCountriesHint: Select every country you can ship to.
add.saveError: Could not save the product. Check the fields.

orders.title: Incoming Orders
orders.emptyBody: Orders from buyers will appear here.
orders.pickupHint: Give this to the driver when they collect. They enter it in the app to start the trip.
orders.deliveryOtpNote: The buyer has been sent a separate delivery OTP, which the driver collects on arrival to close the order.
orders.otpNote: Two one-time codes are generated. You see the pickup OTP; the buyer sees the delivery OTP.

auctions.title: Auctions
auctions.subtitle: Live bidding on your listings.
auctions.emptyBody: Start one from an existing listing, or tick “Auction” when adding a product.
auctions.allAuctions: Every listing is already an auction. Add a new product and tick “Auction”.
auctions.sealedHint: Sealed bidding: only you see the bids. The highest bidder wins when it closes.

bids.title: Buyer Bids
bids.signIn: Sign in to bid on requirements
bids.subtitle: Buyer requirements open for bidding, plus direct enquiries on your listings.
bids.emptyBody: When a buyer posts a requirement it lands here for your bid.
bids.currentBest: Current best is {{price}}/{{unit}} — you must go lower.
bids.noBidsOpening: No bids yet — set the opening price.

ads.title: Ads
ads.signIn: Sign in to promote your listings
ads.subtitle: Boost a listing to the top of relevant searches. An admin reviews every campaign before it goes live.
ads.emptyBody: Submit your first promotion — an admin will review it, then it goes live.

inventory.title: Inventory
inventory.emptyBody: Add your first listing to start selling.

offers.title: Offers
offers.subtitle: Feature products as deals on the marketplace.
offers.emptyBody: Add a product first, then flag it as an offer.

routes.title: Routes
routes.emptyBody: Add lanes you serve, including cross-border ones.
routes.name: Route name

drivers.title: Drivers
drivers.emptyBody: Add your drivers with licence, experience and rate.
drivers.name: Name

vehicles.title: Vehicles
vehicles.emptyBody: Add your first vehicle to dispatch loads.

myRequests.title: My Requests
myRequests.subtitle: Loads you have posted for other carriers to quote on.
myRequests.emptyBody: Post a load above to collect quotes.

invoices.title: Invoices
invoices.subtitle: Raise freight invoices for delivered trips and track them here.
invoices.emptyBody: Complete a trip, then raise its freight invoice.
invoices.freightPlaceholder: Leave blank to use the agreed quote

requests.title: Available Loads
requests.emptyBody: New freight requests will appear here.

tracking.title: Tracking
tracking.subtitle: Open live tracking for active trips.
tracking.emptyBody: Accepted loads appear here while they are in motion.

quotes.title: Quotes
quotes.subtitle: Bids you've placed on available loads.
quotes.emptyBody: Quote on a load from Available Loads to see it here.

ratings.title: Ratings
ratings.subtitle: Driver reliability and on-time performance.
ratings.emptyBody: Add drivers to start tracking service quality.

loads.title: My Loads
loads.subtitle: Enter the seller's pickup OTP to start, the buyer's delivery OTP to finish.
loads.emptyBody: When a seller dispatches an order to you it appears here.

room.sealedNote: Bids on a quote request stay private — only you see the prices.
room.maskedNote: Seller names are hidden. You see every price and the ranking.
room.ownerBookNote: Every seller who bid, cheapest first. Only you see their names.
room.sealedNoBid: You haven't bid on this requirement yet.
room.noBidsOpening: No bids yet — name your opening price.
room.ownerHint: Award the offer you want — it becomes an order straight away.
room.signInToBid: Sign in to bid on this requirement.
room.sealedBanner: Sealed mode. Seller names and photos are masked until you accept a quote. Quotes can't see each other.

bids.photosHint: Add up to 6 photos of what you need. Optional.
bids.subtitle: Post what you need. Sellers come to you.
bids.emptyReqBody: Post one and sellers will bid against it.
bids.emptyBidsBody: Open a live auction and place your first bid.

modeCopy.quote: Sellers submit sealed bids. You compare them and pick a winner.
modeCopy.auction: A reverse auction — sellers see the price to beat and underbid each other.

transport.emptyShipBody: Once a seller dispatches an order, its carrier, vehicle and live status appear here.
transport.emptyReqBody: Create a request and transporters will quote.
transport.otpHint: Give this to the driver only once the goods have physically arrived.

auctions.subtitle: Bid on seller lots, or run your own reverse auction.
auctions.emptyMyBody: Create one from Bids & RFQs → Post → Create auction.

safeDeal.emptyBody: Paid orders awaiting delivery appear here.

saved.subtitle: Safe-deal products bookmarked for quick re-ordering.
saved.emptyBody: Safe-deal products you follow appear here.

messages.subtitle: Chat with the sellers behind your orders.
messages.emptyBody: Place an order and you can message the seller from here.

invoices.subtitle: Tap any invoice to open its PDF.
invoices.emptyBody: Invoices appear here as soon as a counterparty raises one.

orders.signInBody: Your orders appear here once you're signed in.
orders.emptyBody: Browse the marketplace to place your first order.

bids.empty: No live buyer bids right now. Check back soon.

pd.orderPlacedBody: Your order is in escrow under Safe Deal.
pd.transportBody: Book transport from your buyer console.
pd.escrowNote: Safe-Deal escrow · funds held until QC passes

req.empty: No open requirements — post the first one.

sub.sellers: Filter by market, country and rating.
sub.transporters: Fleets ready to move your cargo.

dir.opsHint: Helps buyers find you by where you work and what jobs you take.

checkout.placedBody: Funds are held in Safe Deal escrow.
checkout.title: Checkout

home.safeDealBody: Funds held until you confirm delivery.
home.cantFindBody: Post an RFQ and get sealed quotes in hours.

notif.title: Notifications
notif.chooseHow: Choose how you want to be notified for each kind of activity.

search.emptyBody: Type to find products across the marketplace.

offers.title: Offers of the Day
offers.emptyBody: Check back soon for fresh deals.

browse.title: Browse
browse.emptyBody: Try clearing filters or a different search.

auc.sealedInfo: Sealed bidding — only the auction owner sees the bids.
auc.openInfo: Live auctions — every offer price is public; bidder identities stay masked until the lot closes.

kyc.permBody: Allow photo access to upload a document.
kyc.title: Verify your business
kyc.intro: Upload your trade license and ID to unlock Safe Deal and higher limits. Reviewed within one business day.
kyc.underReview: Your documents are with our review team.

profile.privacyNote: Phone numbers and emails are private on AgroTraders — connect via chat.

ph.bidTitle: Basmati rice — 100 MT for Jebel Ali

filter.title: Filters
filter.categoryHint: Pick a category to unlock its specification filters.

rfq.title: Quote basket
rfq.emptyBody: Add listings from any supplier, then send one request for quote per supplier.
rfq.addedBody: {{name}} is in your basket. Send the request when you have added everything.
rfq.sentBody: The supplier will respond with a quote. Track it under Bids.
rfq.noteFromBasket: Sent from the quote basket to {{supplier}}.
rfq.footNote: Each supplier receives its own request. Quotes stay private to you.

auction.maskedNote: Every offer price is public; bidder identities are masked until the lot closes.
auction.noBidsYet: No bids yet — be the first.

wallet.title: Wallet
wallet.subtitle: Add funds to pay for orders and to hire others.

hire.instant: {{name}} gets your request instantly and can accept or decline.
hire.trackHint: Track it under Hires — you'll be notified when they respond.
hire.signInPrompt: Sign in to send a hire request.

order.title: Order {{ref}}
order.pickupHint: Give this to the driver when they collect the goods.
order.deliveryHint: Give this to the driver only once the goods have arrived.

bid.sealedNote: Sealed bidding — only the seller sees bid amounts. Highest bid wins at close.
bid.noBidsYou: You haven't bid yet — be the first.
bid.ownerNote: This is your auction — you can't bid on your own lot.
bid.autoBidSub: We'll bid the minimum needed up to your limit.

logistics.title: Arrange logistics — #{{ref}}
logistics.accepted: {{name}} accepted. Close this sheet and tap Dispatch once the order is packed.
logistics.emptyDirectory: Nobody listed in this directory yet.

community.dmEmpty: Say hello — ask about price, quantity or delivery.

profile.photoPermission: Photo permission is needed to set an avatar.
profile.uploadFailed: Upload failed. Try a smaller photo.
profile.photoHint: JPG, PNG or WebP · up to 10 MB
profile.publicSub: Shown on your directory card and profile page.
profile.privateSub: Never shown publicly — others see a masked hint and reach you via chat.

jobs.title: My Jobs
jobs.emptyBody: Jobs assigned to you appear here.

chart.noData: No data yet for this period.

invoices.title: Invoices
invoices.subtitle: Track issued and received invoices, then open the PDF when needed.
invoices.emptyBody: Invoices appear here as work and orders progress.
